sourceTitle: GeoNames Syrian Arab Republic Gazetteer Extract

rawFiles.name: imports/raw/2026-06-28-localities/geonames-sy-populated-place-records.tsv
rawFiles.notes: Filtered SY.txt rows where feature class is P and the feature code represents a populated-place candidate.

rawFiles.name: imports/raw/2026-06-28-localities/geonames-locality-match-report.json
rawFiles.notes: Previous strict locality match report used as context for records that remained without GeoNames IDs.

transforms: Reviewed existing locality records that still lacked GeoNames IDs after the strict automated and manual review passes.
Matched only against unused GeoNames populated-place rows from the same Syria extract.
Normalized names by removing diacritics, punctuation and apostrophe variants, parenthetical qualifiers, and duplicate spacing.
Accepted a match only when the locality had exactly one normalized name match within 1 km and the selected GeoNames ID was not selected for any other locality in this pass.
Added only GeoNames external identifiers and the geonames-sy source reference.
Did not add aliases, change locality kind, create new locality records, or infer names from unmatched candidates.
reviewNotes: Accepted 15 close one-to-one GeoNames locality matches. Left wider exact-name candidates, including 2-5 km matches and duplicate GeoNames assignments, unresolved for future manual review.
